data.content: Implementation review REJECTED. Violations of acceptance criteria: (1) 99 ESLint warnings from max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len remain in the 22 listed files on main — acceptance requires zero. (2) The work branch feat/foolery-d17b-style was never merged to main. (3) That branch's approach used centralized ESLint config suppressions (turning rules off for target files) rather than actually refactoring: splitting large files, extracting functions, and shortening lines as the description requires. Next implementer must: merge or rebase the branch, replace config suppressions with real refactoring, and verify zero targeted warnings before handoff.
